description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI - OSX/Linux via Conda that runs on push and pull request events, ignoring certain paths. The workflow should use a concurrency group and cancel in-progress jobs. It should have a matrix job pinocchio-conda that runs on ubuntu-latest and macos-latest with different Python versions and build types, using Conda. The job should check out the repository, set up caching, install Miniconda, and build Pinocchio with various options. Additionally, it should have a check job that runs after pinocchio-conda and checks if all jobs succeeded.
